name: Curried Turkey on Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the apple and onion in the margarine until the onion is tender.
2. Stir in the flour, salt, and curry powder.
3. Slowly add the milk to the mixture.
4. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
5. Stir in the turkey.
6. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until hot and bubbly.
7. Serve on cooked brown rice.
(Note: The quantity of rice is not specified. Assume it is not included in the nutritional values.)
Nutritional Information:
- 1/4 recipe - 353 calories, 3 lean meat, 2 bread, 1 fat exchange
- 32 grams carbohydrate, 26 grams protein, 13 grams fat
- 306 mg sodium, 408 mg potassium, 56 mg cholesterol
Source: American Diabetes Association Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman (1986)
